patch.value: Runtime support now starts at Node.js 22.13; CI and release workflows use Node 22.13 and Bun 1.3.11.
Raised the minimum runtime to Node.js 22.13 and pinned CI/release toolchains to Node 22.13 and Bun 1.3.11.
Backfilled into the pm tracker to preserve the Unreleased CHANGELOG entries for pm-generated changelog parity.
